description_long: This is an ornate, metallic crown with a circular gold band as its base. The front features a large, pointed, red gem-encrusted centerpiece that rises sharply above the band, flanked by two crescent-shaped gold ornaments. The band itself is adorned with several round red gemstones evenly spaced along its circumference. The crown's design is regal and ceremonial, with a highly polished, reflective gold finish and intricate detailing. The interior appears hollow, designed to fit securely on the head, and the overall construction suggests a blend of luxury and authority.
description: A gold ceremonial crown with a tall, red gem-encrusted centerpiece and crescent-shaped side ornaments, adorned with red gemstones around the band.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gold band, crescent ornaments, and the tall, pointed centerpiece without visible gemstones.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the band and the row of red gemstones set into the side.
description_view_2: Direct front view displaying the large, red, gem-encrusted centerpiece and symmetrical arrangement of side ornaments and gemstones.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the band’s profile and the alignment of red gemstones, with the centerpiece edge-on.
attribute_brim_style: narrow, circular band with no extended brim
attribute_crown_shape: tall and pointed with a prominent central spire
